text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I thought "Just go for it," and got a custom
honeyade with all the toppings. ♪ There's
whipped cream, syrup, cinnamon...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
...Think it's got a lot of calories? And I had that
crepe yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text: Oh well! I'll just train extra hard tomorrow.
